scenarios.description: appendChild(null) throws IllegalArgumentException when child is null (Validate.notNull fail)
appendChild(firstChild) creates new childNodes list and sets sibling index to 0
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is parent; parent.childNodeSize() == 1; parent.child(0) == child; child.parent() == parent; child.siblingIndex == 0
pseudocode: assert result == parent; assert parent.childNodeSize() == 1; assert parent.child(0) == child; assert child.parent() == parent; assert child.siblingIndex() == 0;

scenarios.description: appendChild(secondChild) reuses existing childNodes list and sets sibling index to 1
scenarios.expectedResult: parent.childNodeSize() == 2; parent.child(1) == second; second.parent() == parent; second.siblingIndex == 1
pseudocode: assert parent.childNodeSize() == 2; assert parent.child(1) == second; assert second.parent() == parent; assert second.siblingIndex() == 1;

scenarios.description: appendChild(chained) supports chaining calls and maintains order across three children
scenarios.expectedResult: parent.childNodeSize() == 3; children in order [c1,c2,c3]; each child.parent() == parent; sibling indices 0,1,2 respectively
pseudocode: assert parent.childNodeSize() == 3; assert parent.child(0)==c1; assert parent.child(1)==c2; assert parent.child(2)==c3; assert c1.siblingIndex()==0; assert c2.siblingIndex()==1; assert c3.siblingIndex()==2;
